title: Mayapetika
subTitle: A mobile phone gifted to a giant movie star keeps changing owners and journeys to different people, turning their lives upside down.

title: Muddayi
subTitle: A naive man is framed for a brutal murder that he did not commit. However, he is determined to prove his innocence and seek justice.

title: Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular songs, performed by gifted artists and musicians, is played in rapid succession.

title: Yoga Based Programme
subTitle: Yoga experts showcase various postures and meditation methods, offering practical tools for managing everyday stress and improving wellbeing.

title: Madhurimalu
subTitle: A chef shares some kitchen secrets, simple dessert recipes and demonstrates how to whip up mouthwatering treats in an easy-to-understand manner.

title: Anandam
subTitle: Two feuding college neighbours unknowingly become pen pals under secret aliases. Subsequently, as they share their deepest thoughts, they start liking one another.

title: Marina Manishi
subTitle: Raju is a thief though nobody is aware of this. His life takes a turn when he comes across a burglar named Rangoon, who holds several secrets.

title: Kondapalli Raja
subTitle: Raja, a milkman, and Ashok, a millionaire, are childhood friends. However, their friendship is threatened when Gangadharam, Ashok's father, tries to drive a wedge between them.

title: Telugu Hits
subTitle: A compilation of some of the most trending Telugu hits composed by famous artists is played back-to-back to enthrall the audience.

subTitle: Rajasekharam and Jayalaxmi get married and move to a new house, where they meet their neighbour, Subba Rao. When Subba Rao feels insulted by the couple, he plans to destroy their newly married life.

title: Nindu Dampatulu
subTitle: Ramu, who runs a pan shop, takes care of his cousin Vani and wishes to marry her someday. However, he is unaware that Vani is in love with Ravi, the son of a rich landlord.
